'''jakusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeid|zeid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-k-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeid|zeid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jakusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jækisith|jækisith]] || [[word:jækisij|jækisij]] || [[word:jækisish|jækisish]] || [[word:jækisi|jækisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jakukusuth|jakukusuth]] || [[word:jakukusuj|jakukusuj]] || [[word:jakukusush|jakukusush]] || [[word:jakukusu|jakukusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jakusuth|jakusuth]] || [[word:jakusuj|jakusuj]] || [[word:jakusush|jakusush]] || [[word:jakusu|jakusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jakufsuth|jakufsuth]] || [[word:jakufsuj|jakufsuj]] || [[word:jakufsush|jakufsush]] || [[word:jakufsuf|jakufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jakusuthu|jakusuthu]] || [[word:jakusuju|jakusuju]] || [[word:jakusushu|jakusushu]] || [[word:jakusuku|jakusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jakusuth|jakusuth]] || [[word:jakusuj|jakusuj]] || [[word:jakusush|jakusush]] || [[word:jakusu|jakusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jakusuthul|jakusuthul]] || [[word:jakusujul|jakusujul]] || [[word:jakusushul|jakusushul]] || [[word:jakusukul|jakusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jakusuthuthu|jakusuthuthu]] || [[word:jakusujuju|jakusujuju]] || [[word:jakusushushu|jakusushushu]] || [[word:jakusuku|jakusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jakusuthun|jakusuthun]] || [[word:jakusujun|jakusujun]] || [[word:jakusushun|jakusushun]] || [[word:jakusukun|jakusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jakusuthuoro|jakusuthuoro]] || [[word:jakusujuoro|jakusujuoro]] || [[word:jakusushuoro|jakusushuoro]] || [[word:jakusukuoro|jakusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
